hildren":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}],"height":"32px"}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"【机制讲解】","color":"","fontSize":"18px","bold":true,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"兵祸的机制非常简单粗暴，首先是全难度通用的【击杀再动+回合叠攻】，前者为实打实的萌新杀手，队伍只要减员，就会被兵祸一套Aoe组合拳直接送走，后者则是“输出检测”，数值不够被拉入长线作战，就会被兵祸缓慢上涨的水温活活烫死，想轻松攻略，就得在这两大机制上做对策。","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":"","text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"先来看【击杀再动】，“炼狱”难度之前，兵祸的进攻手只会上“防御下降”debuff，携带任意奶妈就可以很好的保证队伍生存，直接废掉兵祸的再动，可选的奶妈有“缬草（平均血量、高额护盾、短暂无敌）”“善雅（持续回复、生命提升）”“千明（持续回复、高额减伤）”，除了携带奶妈，也可以让输出优先选中进攻手，击杀之后能大大减少Boss输出，方便后续击杀本体","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"table","key":"lfDCkMqYY4JAf7iG","width":"683px","children":[{"type":"table-row","children":[{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"100px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"击杀再动","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]},{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"583px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"携带奶妈，保证队伍生存","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"可选角色：","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""},{"type":"image","key":"yOZAetFnHWS1ZfJ5","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_180/h_180/50364/888007/2025/7/26/302755.png","alt":"","style":{"width":"50px","height":"50px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"缬草、","color":"","fontSize":"","bold :"","width":"583px","isMerged":true,"colSpan":0,"children":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"type":"table-row","children":[{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"100px","colSpan":2,"children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"Tips：赫尔基德3技能虽然能提供护盾，但整体数值和其攻击力有关，想要在PVE使用，核心刚需2个攻击，在这种养成条件下，护盾依旧不尽人意，不推荐使用","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]},{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"583px","isMerged":true,"colSpan":0,"children":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"再来看【回合叠攻】，常规思路是“快速通关”，不让重构兵祸叠攻击力，可选的方案有【高伤速杀】【加速/推拉条】，要么直接跟boss爆了，要么通过技能效果，制造更多我方回合，减少boss出手次数，box较差，缺少上述角色的情况下，可以选择邪门思路，通过嘲讽角色，强制兵祸释放1技能，减少释放加攻2技能的次数，这里推荐使用R卡恶命，技能加点便宜的同时，还能兼顾回复、推条，后续在虚烬探索也能高频就业，超级保值。","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"table","key":"9R2azEMfhtlkkG6y","width":"684px","children":[{"type":"table-row","children":[{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"100px","rowSpan":3,"children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"回合叠攻","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]},{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"584px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"高伤速杀，减少出手次数","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"可选角色：直伤【","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""},{"type":"image","key":"eNbOCznbEFfmMyZX","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_87/h_87/50364/888007/2025/7/26/793637.png","alt":"","style":{"width":"50px","height":"50px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"谛听、","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""},{"type":"image","key":"PxtsOwI6QizGE h","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"更好用的推/拉条：","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""},{"type":"image","key":"nHAzUyY9DfINgk7p","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_180/h_180/50364/888007/2025/7/26/61506.png","alt":"","style":{"width":"50px","height":"50px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"梨梨、","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""},{"type":"image","key":"H02xNevj0DYv3cIV","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_180/h_180/50364/888007/2025/7/26/215256.png","alt":"","style":{"width":"50px","height":"50px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"渺渺（非炼狱）、","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""},{"type":"image","key":"b9w8VBY4gKNbYBhN","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_180/h_180/50364/888007/2025/7/26/594940.png","alt":"","style":{"width":"50px","height":"50px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"多琪、","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""},{"type":"image","key":"2q8akLqfBgp9N6nS","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_180/h_180/50364/888007/2025/7/26/348544.png","alt":"","style":{"width":"50px","height":"50px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"芙蕾雅（非炼狱）","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]},{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"584px","isMerged":true,"colSpan":0,"children":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"type":"table-row","children":[{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"100px","colSpan":2,"children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"更好用的直伤：","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""},{"type":"image","key":"OMt9yXxeTRdO5pWI","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_180/h_180/50364/888007/2025/7/26/342508.png","alt":"","style":{"width":"50px","height":"50px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"夜离、","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""},{"type":"image","key":"oPY3wmKygz4dLcEK","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_180/h_180/50364/888007/2025/7/26/462957.png","alt":"","style":{"width":"50px","height":"50px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"莉拉姆、","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""},{"type":"image","key":"fmhbZtVeWnPg7YUE","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_180/h_180/50364/888007/2025/7/26/679637.png","alt":"","style":{"width":"50px","height":"50px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"柯洛罗（不推荐）、","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""},{"type":"image","key":"eX9VKvafvGBVgqS9","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_180/h_180/50364/888007/2025/7/26/540127.png","alt":"","style":{"width":"50px","height":"50px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"赫妍（不推荐）","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]},{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"584px","isMerged":true,"colSpan":0,"children":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"type":"table-row","children":[{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"100px","colSpan":2,"children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"Tips：柯洛罗想要在炼狱兵祸打出爆炸输出，刚需多段伤害队友辅助，现阶段火、草、光、暗没有很适合他的队友，往往要2~3轮行动才能打出印记大招，不推荐使用","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"赫妍虽然有着非常不错的单体爆发能力，但2技能被动提供的濒死大招锁定的是造成致命伤害的单位，兵祸本体行动之后，蛇头会追加攻击，自动索敌容易出错，更推荐手操情况下使用","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]},{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"584px","isMerged":true,"colSpan":0,"children":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"解决上述两种机制，通关地狱难度不成问题，但到了炼狱难度，全都不一样了，Boss开局就有3回合的【免疫】，buff存在时推条、控制均不生效，免疫掉了也有60%的“减少行动进度”效果抵抗，没法通过推条无脑击杀boss。攻击手debuff追加【禁疗】，没有净化根本抬不动血线，再加上克属增伤，对【异】属性角色造成额外200%伤害，直接废掉最稳定好用的净化奶妈凌罗，所以，需要根据新增机制，重新组一套适配炼狱的队伍。","color":"","fontSize":"","bold"
